summary.name: My QComponent
summary.description: This is a QComponent brief summary

summary.name: Cap NInterdigital Tee
summary.description:
Generates a three pin (+) structure comprised of a primary two pin CPW
    transmission line, and a secondary one pin neighboring CPW transmission
    line that is capacitively coupled to the primary.

summary.name: Coupled Line Tee
summary.description:
Generates a three pin (+) 
    structure comprised of a primary two 
    pin CPW transmission line, and a 
    secondary one pin neighboring CPW 
    transmission line that is 
    capacitively/inductively coupled 
    to the primary.

summary.name: Line Tee
summary.description:
Generates a three pin (+) structure comprised of a primary two pin CPW
    transmission line, and a secondary one pin neighboring CPW transmission
    line that is capacitively coupled to the primary.

summary.name: Cap3Interdigital
summary.description: Create a three finger planar capacitor with a ground pocket cuttout.

summary.name: Cap NInterdigital
summary.description:
Generates a two pin (+) structure
     comprised of a north CPW transmission line, 
     and a south transmission line, coupled 
     together via a finger capacitor.

summary.name: Resonator Coil Rect
summary.description:
A rectangle spiral resonator based on length input. The X dimension is
    modified by the code based on the total length inputed.

summary.name: Transmon Pocket CL
summary.description:
Create a standard pocket transmon qubit for a ground plane,
    with two pads connected by a junction

summary.name: Smiley Face
summary.description: TEST COMPONENT It is for fun only

summary.name: Launchpad Wirebond
summary.description: Launch pad to feed/read signals to/from the chip.

summary.name: Launchpad Wirebond Coupled
summary.description: Launch pad to feed/read signals to/from the chip.

summary.name: Launchpad Wirebond Driven
summary.description: Launch pad to feed/read signals to/from the chip.

summary.name: Open To Ground
summary.description: A basic open to ground termination.

summary.name: Short To Ground
summary.description: A basic short to ground termination

summary.name: Route Anchors
summary.description: Creates and connects a series of anchors through which the Route passes.

summary.name: Route Framed
summary.description: A non-meandered basic CPW that is auto-generated between 2 components.

summary.name: Route Meander
summary.description: Implements a simple CPW, with a single meander.

summary.name: Route Mixed
summary.description:
Implements fully featured Routing, allowing different type of
    connections between anchors.

summary.name: Route Pathfinder
summary.description:
Non-meandered CPW class that combines A* pathfinding algorithm with
    simple 1-, 2-, or S-shaped segment checks and user-specified anchor points.

summary.name: Route Straight
summary.description: Draw a straight Route connecting two pins.
